name: cold-email-generator
description: Generates cold email copy for instantly.ai campaigns with spintax. Supports 4 email types (Personalisation-led, Case Study-led, Bullet Point, Condensed) and Sequence 1 plus Sequence 2 follow-ups. Reads sender, value props, case studies, credibility, and mailing address from client-brief.md. Parses user input first, asks only for missing inputs, never ships placeholder brackets. Outputs each sequence as a separate markdown artifact for copy-paste into instantly.ai.
